info.name: SBExpress Cargo API
info.description:
Full API collection. Base URL: `{{baseUrl}}` (default http://localhost:3000/api). Run **Login** first to set `accessToken` for protected routes. Login requires `platform`: `portal` or `mobile`.

**List APIs** return paginated response: `{ success, message, data, total, page, limit, totalPages }`. All list endpoints support query params: `page` (default 1), `limit` (default 20, max 100), `sortBy` (field name), `sortOrder` (asc|desc), `search` (generic search term).
